highlights.description: Batteries-included starter template for building AI agents with OmniAgent
Pre-configured with 18 markdown skills, GitHub API skill, web search, and Meeting Facilitator role

added.description: Starter bundle with skills and roles for quick agent setup
Runnable agent in `cmd/agent/main.go` demonstrating skills, roles, and session storage
Integration with `omniskill-pack` providing 18 markdown skills (git, docker, tmux, weather, etc.)
GitHub SDK skill via `omni-github` for issues, PRs, and code search
Web search skill via `omniserp` for Google/news search
Meeting Facilitator role via `omnirole-facilitator` with action tracking
SQLite session storage for persistent conversations
Environment variable configuration for LLM providers, channels, and skills

documentation.description: README with quick start guide and usage examples
README expanded with runnable starter template documentation
Narrative context for OmniAgent, Skills, and Roles ecosystem

infrastructure.description: GitHub Actions shared workflows for CI/CD
Add `omniagent.db` to `.gitignore` for runtime SQLite storage
